description_long: This is a weathered bronze bust of a man, depicted from the chest up, mounted on a rectangular plinth. The figure is dressed in a suit jacket, shirt, and tie, with a stern, contemplative expression and closely cropped hair. The surface of the sculpture shows streaks and patina, characteristic of aged bronze exposed to the elements, giving it a greenish-blue coloration with lighter streaks. The bust is highly detailed, with defined facial features, ears, and the folds of the clothing rendered in relief. The back of the sculpture is smooth and rounded, following the contours of the head and shoulders, with the plinth providing a stable base. This type of sculpture is commonly found in public parks, plazas, or near civic buildings as a commemorative monument.
description: A weathered bronze bust of a man in a suit, featuring detailed facial features and a greenish patina, mounted on a rectangular plinth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's stern face, detailed suit, and tie, with visible patina streaks on the forehead and chest.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the sharp nose, ear, and the contour of the suit's shoulder, with streaks running down the side of the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded back of the head and shoulders, with the plinth's rectangular shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view similar to the left, showing the ear, nose, and the drape of the jacket, with patina streaks on the head and shoulder.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an outdoor urban plaza, park, or near a civic building.
